page_metadata.biotools__summary: NeuroMorpho.Org is a centrally curated inventory of digitally reconstructed neurons associated with peer-reviewed publications. It contains contributions from over 800 laboratories worldwide and is continuously updated as new morphological reconstructions are collected, published, and shared.
